title: Delivery Ticket Generator
excerpt: Hi we are looking to create a document that our courier driver can get the customer to sign on reciept of a delivery from Monday.com - has anyone done this before? One signed (maybe on a phone or ipad) I would like the P…

posts.author: sfarris (Sam Farris)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi we are looking to create a document that our courier driver can get the customer to sign on reciept of a delivery from Monday.com - has anyone done this before? One signed (maybe on a phone or ipad) I would like the POD to be emailed to the customer. We have all of the board set up with the orders etc so its just a Document to sign from a tablet. Anyone got any tips?

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sfarris

If you’re open to using Marketplace apps, you could try GetSign - eSignatures, PDF Generator & Form Builder. It’s a good option for collecting signatures and generating signed PDFs directly from your board.

There are also a few other e-signature apps in the monday Marketplace that offer similar functionality, so it’s worth exploring to see which one best fits your workflow and budget.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
Have you tried monday vibe? You could use it create a mobile app in your account to collect signatures and set up automations to email the client once complete.

https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/28451758349842-Get-started-with-monday-vibe

Desiree - www.thecleverclovers.com
